proposedAdditions.description: Flat list of entries to add to the child fence.json. sence merges them into existing arrays. Never re-list existing entries here.

value.description: A single fence.json entry, e.g. a domain, path, or command prefix.

riskLevel.description: Informational only. sence applies its own static safety checks independently.

rationale.description: One short sentence explaining why this entry is needed.

relatedDenial.description: Trace string identifying which denial this addition addresses (e.g. "file:/path read", "net:host:port").

explanation.description: One short sentence describing the overall change.

resumeCommand.description: The shell command to resume the agent session, or null if unknown.

title.description: 2-5 word headline (e.g. "allow npm registry"). Used as a slug in the patch filename, so prefer concrete nouns and avoid filler words.
